raw_source.title: [吉隆坡] 某头部币所诚聘 测试工程师 薪水open P6起
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
某头部币所

## 薪资福利待遇
薪资open,百万起

## 地点

- 工作地点：吉隆坡
- 联系方式：VX:ljlljl269 Email：baron.lee@interwinee.com

## 岗位要求、职责
Job description:

Responsible for business testing of WEB3 wallets (custody, MPC wallet, mnemonic wallet).
Connect with various business systems, simulate actual usage scenarios, and successfully complete automation work.
Improve the existing testing plan, design automated test cases/scripts to ensure efficient and stable operation of automated testing.
Job requirements:

Bachelor's degree or above, major in computer science or related field.
Two years or more of software testing experience, with WEB3 related work experience preferred.
Understand microservice structure, familiar with commonly used Middleware such as message queue, configuration center, cache, etc.
Familiar with Python/Java/Go any one or more programming languages
Strong logical thinking and analytical skills; good at teamwork, understanding and adapting to changes.


Automation Technology Stack:

Language foundation: Python and Java preferred;

Language framework: Spring framework;

Master databases: relational database MySQL and NoSQL database Redis, etc.

Master common Middleware for microservices: message queue, configuration center, ElasticSearch, Grafana, etc

Automated testing frameworks: common UI automation testing frameworks (AirTest, Appium, Selenium), interface automation testing tools (Jmeter, Loadrunner, or third-party Python libraries).

Linux / Docker
